case_title: CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN VS. ANDREY BOYKO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO ARBITRATION AWARD, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF CONFIRMATION, PETITION TO CONFIRM/CORRECT/VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD, AND CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON 11/28/06 AND DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE ATTACHED FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE, N.A. SERVED NOV-26-2006, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO RESPONDENT BOYKO, ANDREY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 1280 ET SEQ. AND 1285.4. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. COURT VERIFIED PROOF OF SERVICE IS IN THE CASE FILE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
